info.title: BookingShake API
info.description:
The BookingShake API allows you to programmatically create and manage events, bookings, and related resources. Integrate BookingShake with your applications to automate event creation, retrieve booking sources, spaces, statuses, and custom fields.

**Rate Limiting:** All endpoints are rate limited per API key. POST /events/create allows 10 requests per minute, while GET endpoints allow 60 requests per minute. Rate limit information is provided in response headers (X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset).

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Create and manage events and bookings

tags.name: Resources
tags.description: Retrieve booking sources, spaces, and statuses

tags.name: Fields
tags.description: Retrieve available custom and default fields

post.description: Create one or several events (bookings) with contact information and optional company details. Multiple bookings in a single request will be grouped together. Optionally include products to create a draft quotation.

single-event.description: Create a single event with basic information

multiple-events.description: Create multiple events in a single request - they will be grouped together

event-with-products.description: Create an event with products to generate a draft quotation

event-with-custom-fields.description: Create an event with custom field values for booking, contact, and company. Field codes follow the format 'custom_XXXXXXXXXXX' and can be found via GET /fields.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed per minute (10 for this endpoint)

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

value.message: too many bookings - maximum 20 per request
missing required custom field "Budget Range" for contact

429.description: Rate limit exceeded - too many requests

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

get.description: Retrieve all booking sources (channels) available for your venue. Sources represent where bookings originate from (e.g., Website, Phone, Email, Walk-in).

200.description: List of booking sources retrieved successfully

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed per minute (60 for this endpoint)

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

get.description: Retrieve all spaces (rooms/areas) available at your venue. Spaces represent the physical locations where events can be held.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed per minute (60 for this endpoint)

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

get.description: Retrieve all booking statuses available for your venue. Statuses represent the current state of a booking (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Cancelled).

200.description: List of booking statuses retrieved successfully

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed per minute (60 for this endpoint)

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

get.description: Retrieve all available fields (both default and custom) for your venue. Fields include metadata such as type, collection, code, label, and whether they're required in the back office. Custom fields are automatically merged from both venue-level and venue group-level configurations.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed per minute (60 for this endpoint)

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

get.description:
Retrieve a single invoice by its document ID.

Returns invoices, deposit invoices, balance invoices and their credit notes. Quotes are not exposed by this endpoint and return `404`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Invoice document ID (the `id` field carried by the invoice.created webhook).

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed per minute (60 for this endpoint)

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

400.description: Bad request - invalid token or missing invoice id

404.description: Invoice not found. Returned when the invoice does not exist, belongs to another venue, or is not an invoice (e.g. a quote).

get.description:
Retrieve a single payment by its document ID.

Security deposits (holds) are out of scope and return `404`, consistent with the webhooks.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Payment document ID (the `id` field carried by the payment.* webhooks).

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed per minute (60 for this endpoint)

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

400.description: Bad request - invalid token or missing payment id

404.description: Payment not found. Returned when the payment does not exist, belongs to another venue, or is a security deposit (hold).

bearerAuth.description: Bearer authentication using your BookingShake API key. Retrieve your API key from Settings > Integrations in your BookingShake dashboard.

description.example: Full day conference room rental with setup and cleanup

price_without_tax.description: Price in cents (centimes) without tax. NOT in euros/dollars. Example: €150.00 = 15000 cents, €35.50 = 3550 cents

vat.description: VAT rate in basis points (1/100th of a percent). NOT a percentage. Example: 20% = 2000, 10% = 1000, 5.5% = 550. Range: 0-10000 (0% to 100%)

end_time.description: End time in HH:mm format (24-hour). Optional.

space_id.description: ID of the space/room. If not specified, uses the default space (marked in settings), or 'Espace indéterminé', or the first available space.

event_type.description: Type or category of event (e.g., Conference, Wedding, Meeting)

comments.description: Additional notes or special requests for the event

products.description: List of products/services to include in the draft quotation

custom_fields.description: Custom field values for the booking. Keys are field codes (format: 'custom_XXXXXXXXXXX') retrieved from GET /fields. Required custom fields (isRequiredInBO=true) must be provided.

Contact.description: Contact information. Either provide contact_id to use an existing contact, or provide first_name, last_name, and email to create a new contact.

contact_id.description: Existing contact ID. If provided, the API uses the existing contact and ignores other contact fields (first_name, last_name, email). If not provided, first_name, last_name, and email are required to create a new contact.

title.description: Contact's title or honorific (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Dr.)

custom_fields.description: Custom field values for the contact. Keys are field codes (format: 'custom_XXXXXXXXXXX') retrieved from GET /fields. Required custom fields (isRequiredInBO=true) must be provided. Only used when creating a new contact (ignored if contact_id is provided).

Company.description: Company/organization information (optional). Note: A company will only be created if the 'name' field is provided. If the company object is omitted or provided without a name, no company will be created.

legal_name.description: Legal name of the company (dénomination sociale)

company_type.description: Type of company (e.g., SARL, SAS, SA)

custom_fields.description: Custom field values for the company. Keys are field codes (format: 'custom_XXXXXXXXXXX') retrieved from GET /fields. Required custom fields (isRequiredInBO=true) must be provided.

bookings.description: Array of one or more bookings to create (maximum 20 per request). Multiple bookings will be grouped together.

source_slug.description: Booking source slug identifier. Found in Settings > Sources. If not provided, uses the default source (marked in settings), or 'Site web', or the first available source.

source_id.description: Booking source ID. Alternative to source_slug. If neither source_slug nor source_id is provided, uses the default source (marked in settings), or 'Site web', or the first available source.

label.description: Source display name (may be in French or configured language)
Space display name (may be in French or configured language)
Status display name (may be in French or configured language)

type.description: Field type (e.g., text, number, date, select)

collection.description: Indicates where the field should be used: 'clients' (contact.custom_fields), 'accounts' (company.custom_fields), or 'reservations' (booking.custom_fields)

code.description: Field code/identifier. For custom fields, follows the format 'custom_XXXXXXXXXXX'

label.description: Field display label (translated based on venue's default language)

isRequiredInBO.description: Whether the field is required in the back office

isCustom.description: Indicates if this is a custom field (true) or a default system field (false)

data.description: Additional data for select-type fields (list of available options)

message.description: Error message describing what went wrong

remaining.description: Requests remaining (always 0 on rate limit error)

resetAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the limit resets

Invoice.description: An issued invoice. Identical to the `data` block of the invoice.created webhook. All amounts are integer cents; dates are `YYYY-MM-DD` strings in the `Europe/Paris` timezone; missing values are explicit `null`.

number.description: Invoice number as printed on the PDF

language.description: Language the document was issued in (e.g. fr, en)

service_start_date.description: Start of the service period, YYYY-MM-DD

service_end_date.description: End of the service period, YYYY-MM-DD

amount_excl_tax.description: Total excluding tax of this document, in cents

amount_incl_tax.description: Total including tax of this document, in cents

taxable_breakdown.description: Taxable base per VAT rate (key = rate in %, value = cents)

tax_breakdown.description: Tax amount per VAT rate (key = rate in %, value = cents)

global_discount_excl_tax.description: Global discount excluding tax, in cents (not distributed into lines, EN 16931 BG-20)

booking_id.description: Opaque correlation key of the booking, shared by all invoices and payments of the same booking

quote_id.description: ID of the quote this invoice was generated from

linked_invoice_id.description: For credit notes: ID of the corrected invoice

deposit_invoices.description: For balance invoices: prior deposit invoices deducted

pdf_url.description: URL of the generated PDF document

InvoiceLine.description: Invoice line item as printed on the PDF. sum(lines[].total_excl_tax) - global_discount_excl_tax = amount_excl_tax (within rounding).

unit.description: Unit of measure when applicable (e.g. day for accommodation lines)

unit_price_excl_tax.description: Unit price excluding tax, in cents, before discount

discount.description: Total line discount, in cents (0 if none)

total_excl_tax.description: Line net amount in cents (can be negative on balance-invoice deduction lines)

DepositInvoice.description: A prior deposit invoice deducted from a balance invoice.

InvoiceSeller.description: Frozen snapshot of the seller (your venue) at issue time. peppol_id is the only field read live.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, or null if unresolved

InvoiceAccount.description: Frozen snapshot of the buyer account (company) at issue time. peppol_id is read live.

billing_country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 for the billing country

peppol_id.description: Peppol participant ID for e-invoicing routing, read live

InvoiceContact.description: Frozen snapshot of the buyer contact at issue time.

Payment.description: A payment. Identical to the `data` block of the payment.* webhooks. Amount is integer cents; dates are `YYYY-MM-DD` strings in the `Europe/Paris` timezone; timestamps are Unix milliseconds; missing values are explicit `null`.

name.description: Payment label as entered by the user

method.description: Payment method, verbatim label (not a normalized enum); appears in the venue locale language. Do not build logic on exact values.

received_date.description: Date the payment was received, YYYY-MM-DD

due_date.description: Date the payment is expected, YYYY-MM-DD

invoice_id.description: ID of the linked invoice (matches the invoice document id)

invoice_number.description: Number of the linked invoice, denormalized for convenience

booking_id.description: Opaque correlation key of the booking, shared by all payments and invoices of the same booking

RateLimitExceeded.description: Rate limit exceeded - too many requests

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets
